mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refunds (order_id, user_id, merchant_id, reason, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, o.order_no, o.product_name, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, u.username FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN merchants m ON r.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, o.order_no, o.product_name, u.username FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, o.order_no, o.product_name, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, u.username FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN merchants m ON r.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.status = 'pending' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.*, o.order_no, o.product_name, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, u.username FROM refunds r LEFT JOIN orders o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN merchants m ON r.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE refunds SET status = #{status}, result = #{result}, processed_at = #{processedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
